'''鈭歴-p-s-th''' ('''kasapsethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:backheel|backheel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-p-s-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:backheel|backheel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-p-s-th
|-
! Lemma
| kasapsethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisapsethoko|thisapsethoko]] || [[word:jisapsethoko|jisapsethoko]] || [[word:shisapsethoko|shisapsethoko]] || [[word:kisapsethoko|kisapsethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusapsethoko|thuthusapsethoko]] || [[word:jujusapsethoko|jujusapsethoko]] || [[word:shushusapsethoko|shushusapsethoko]] || [[word:kukusapsethoko|kukusapsethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusapsethoko|thusapsethoko]] || [[word:jusapsethoko|jusapsethoko]] || [[word:shusapsethoko|shusapsethoko]] || [[word:kusapsethoko|kusapsethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusapsethoko|thusapsethoko]] || [[word:jusapsethoko|jusapsethoko]] || [[word:shusapsethoko|shusapsethoko]] || [[word:kusapsethoko|kusapsethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesapsethoko|thesapsethoko]] || [[word:jesapsethoko|jesapsethoko]] || [[word:shesapsethoko|shesapsethoko]] || [[word:kesapsethoko|kesapsethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosapsethoko|thothosapsethoko]] || [[word:jojosapsethoko|jojosapsethoko]] || [[word:shoshosapsethoko|shoshosapsethoko]] || [[word:kokosapsethoko|kokosapsethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosapsethoko|thosapsethoko]] || [[word:josapsethoko|josapsethoko]] || [[word:shosapsethoko|shosapsethoko]] || [[word:kosapsethoko|kosapsethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosapsethoko|thosapsethoko]] || [[word:josapsethoko|josapsethoko]] || [[word:shosapsethoko|shosapsethoko]] || [[word:kosapsethoko|kosapsethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙sapsethoko|th忙sapsethoko]] || [[word:j忙sapsethoko|j忙sapsethoko]] || [[word:sh忙sapsethoko|sh忙sapsethoko]] || [[word:k忙sapsethoko|k忙sapsethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasapsethoko|thathasapsethoko]] || [[word:jajasapsethoko|jajasapsethoko]] || [[word:shashasapsethoko|shashasapsethoko]] || [[word:kakasapsethoko|kakasapsethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasapsethoko|thasapsethoko]] || [[word:jasapsethoko|jasapsethoko]] || [[word:shasapsethoko|shasapsethoko]] || [[word:kasapsethoko|kasapsethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasapsethoko|thasapsethoko]] || [[word:jasapsethoko|jasapsethoko]] || [[word:shasapsethoko|shasapsethoko]] || [[word:kasapsethoko|kasapsethoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shasapsethithi|shasapsethithi]] || [[word:shasapsethiji|shasapsethiji]] || [[word:shasapsethishi|shasapsethishi]] || [[word:shasapsethiki|shasapsethiki]]
